case_title: CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST VS. DAVID C LIN et al

LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT RICHARD TIPTON'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY) IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS DID NOT AGREE TO VENUE IN SAN FRANCISCO, ONLY THE BORROWER DID SO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Prochnow of Chiles and Prochnow (650.812.0400) for defendant and moving party
Svetlana Rishina of the Law Offices of Martin D. Goodman (397.7956) for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RICHARD TIPTON'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (to Santa Clara County) is granted. Defendants did not agree to venue in San Francisco, only the borrower did so. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189
